tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Gotta tell you - Samantha Mumba
Capo: 1

[Intro]
[tab]                             [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah.[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Your love for me came as a waterfall,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
flowing inside me like never before.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
Your love for me, something I didn't see,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
but baby, I know better now.[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
When you walked in the room that very night,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
a special feeling just burst inside.[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]F#sus4[/ch]     [ch]F#[/ch]
It was only you, nobody else, but baby, I know better now.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
Don't wanna love you if you don't love me.[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bsus4[/ch]   [ch]B7[/ch]
Don't wanna need you when you won't need me too.[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
Don't wanna tell you this now, but it wouldn't be right if I, (if I)[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#sus4[/ch]           [ch]F#[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
didn't tell you this tonight.[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bm[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
(Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah.)[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]               [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
And now you're back inside my house again,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
I'm trying deeply to explain,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
'cause baby, I    wanna get it on,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
and baby, you're the one for me. (woah, woah, woah)[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
And now that I have got you all alone,[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
after all this talking on the phone.[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
I should be strong, there's nothing wrong[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]F#sus4[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch]
I'll tell you this is where you belong.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
Don't wanna love you if you don't love me.[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bsus4[/ch]   [ch]B7[/ch]
Don't wanna need you when you won't need me too.[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
Don't wanna tell you this now, but it wouldn't be right if I, (if I)[/tab]

didn't tell you this tonight.[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
Don't wanna love you if you don't love me.[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bsus4[/ch]   [ch]B7[/ch]
Don't wanna need you when you won't need me too.[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
Don't wanna tell you this now, but it wouldn't be right if I, (if I)[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#sus4[/ch]           [ch]F#[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]
didn't tell you this tonight.[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]F#[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
It was just something in your eyes that made me realise.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]F#[/ch]
Now I hear voices deep inside telling me, telling me it's you and I.[/tab]
